common_fixes.fix: Set wheelchair_boarding to 1 (accessible) or 2 (not accessible) for every stop. A field survey can start with the busiest stops.
Set wheelchair_accessible on every trip (most small-agency fleets are 100% accessible, so this is often a single default).
Re-export the feed with a calendar that reaches further out, and set feed_info feed_end_date past your next service change.
Use mixed case for stop names and headsigns (e.g. 'Main St & 2nd Ave', not 'MAIN ST & 2ND AVE').
Add fare_attributes.txt (or Fares v2 files) with your fare structure. If your service is fare-free, ask to have it marked fare-free instead.
